title: 用 AI 写了一个 AI Coding Agent，欢迎试用和提意见
content: A developer created Aynite, an open-source AI coding agent, after finding existing tools unsatisfactory. The project now has 99.99% AI-generated code, with 43.9% written using Aynite itself plus DeepSeek-V4-Flash. It supports multiple AI providers, features customizable UI layouts (two-panel or three-panel), and has evolved beyond coding to handle tasks like RSS reading and stock charts. The MIT-licensed tool requires only an API key to use.

title: UniRTM，一个统一环境和工具管理软件（致敬 mise）
content: UniRTM is a unified CLI tool for managing development environments, tools, and tasks, inspired by mise. Written in Go, it uses lightweight Go shims instead of Bash wrappers for fast command routing. It manages tool versions, environment variables (with .env and SOPS encryption support), and task workflows in a single .unirtm.toml file. Features include goroutine-based concurrent downloads, mandatory version locking with checksums via unirtm.lock, and native security tool integration (Trivy, Syft). Supports macOS, Linux (glibc and musl/Alpine), and Windows natively with zero external dependencies. Licensed under MIT.
eventKey: unirtm-一个统一环境和工具管理软件-mise
normalizedTitle: unirtm 一个统一环境和工具管理软件 致敬 mise

title: 月之暗面们重写估值游戏规则
content: Chinese AI startup Moonshot AI is seeking a $20 billion funding round at a $30 billion valuation—up from $4.3 billion—despite monthly active users dropping 77% from their 2024 peak. The valuation surge reflects a shift from user-count metrics to revenue fundamentals: Moonshot's annual recurring revenue hit $200 million by April 2026, driven by paid subscriptions and B-for-API usage by developers. The company repositioned from a long-text consumer app to an agent-focused model after competitor DeepSeek's 2025 breakthrough forced strategic reckoning. Industry-wide, Chinese AI firms are collectively revaluing upward as the sector proves commercial viability, though price-to-sales ratios around 150× and heavy cash burn raise sustainability questions.
eventKey: 月之暗面们重写估值游戏规则
normalizedTitle: 月之暗面们重写估值游戏规则

content: China's securities regulator has approved Changxin Technology Group's IPO registration on the STAR Market. The approval is valid for 12 months from the registration date. title: OpenAI 拟大幅降价 与 Anthropic 争夺用户
content: OpenAI is considering significant price cuts for its AI products to attract customers amid competition with Anthropic. The company has confidentially filed for an IPO with the SEC, targeting a valuation exceeding $850 billion and a potential Q4 2024 listing. Recently, OpenAI has increased internal focus by shutting down peripheral projects like Sora while investing heavily in enterprise services and its coding assistant Codex, which competes directly with Anthropic's Claude Code.

title: Prometheus 完成 120 亿美元 B 轮融资，估值达 410 亿美元
content: AI startup Prometheus Inc. closed a $12 billion Series B round at a $41 billion valuation. Co-founded by Jeff Bezos, investors include Bezos, JPMorgan, Blackstone, Goldman Sachs, DST Global, and Arch Venture Partners. The company develops AI tools to accelerate hardware development for robotics, jet engines, drug design, and data center optimization. Most proceeds will fund computing infrastructure.

title: How we made GitHub Copilot CLI more selective about delegation
content: GitHub Copilot CLI now uses smarter subagent delegation to reduce unnecessary handoffs. The main agent handles simple tasks directly, delegates only when specialists add value, and parallelizes independent work. Rolled out to all users in version 1.0.42, this change reduced tool failures by 23% and wait times by 3-5% without quality loss. Overhead decreased through fewer repeated searches, failure-prone paths, and sequential delegation bottlenecks.
eventKey: how-made-github-copilot-cli-more
normalizedTitle: how we made github copilot cli more selective about delegation

title: 马斯克成为全球首位万亿美元富翁
content: SpaceX went public on Nasdaq on June 13, 2026, raising $75 billion at $135 per share in the world's largest IPO. Shares rose 18.21% on the first day to $159.58, giving the company a $2.1 trillion valuation. Elon Musk became the world's first trillionaire as his net worth surpassed $1.1 trillion, roughly doubling his previous ~$400 billion wealth through his ~50% SpaceX stake and Tesla holdings. Tesla's stock has declined about 14% this year amid backlash over Musk's Trump ties and market competition.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 创业邦
